ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_brackets" (
  "age_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age bracket */,
  "start_age" INTEGER /* Starting age of the bracket */,
  "end_age" INTEGER /* Ending age of the bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age bracket */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the age bracket was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the age bracket was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_amounts" (
  "coverage_amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage amount */,
  "amount_value" REAL /* Value of the coverage amount in USD */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coverage amount */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the coverage amount was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the coverage amount was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_amount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_rates" (
  "premium_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium rate */,
  "age_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age bracket */,
  "coverage_amount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coverage amount */,
  "premium_value" REAL /* Value of the premium rate in USD */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the premium rate becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the premium rate ends */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance product */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency in which the premium value is denominated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the premium rate */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium rate was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium rate was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("premium_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES insurance_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_coverage_amount_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_amount_id") REFERENCES coverage_amounts ("coverage_amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_age_bracket_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_bracket_id") REFERENCES age_brackets ("age_bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the insurance product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the product becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the product ends */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_coverage" (
  "product_coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product coverage */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance product */,
  "coverage_amount_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coverage amount */,
  "coverage_status" TEXT /* Status of the coverage */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the product coverage was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the product coverage was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_coverage_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES insurance_products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_coverage_coverage_amount_id FOREIGN KEY ("coverage_amount_id") REFERENCES coverage_amounts ("coverage_amount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, actuary, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "premium_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the premium rate */,
  "old_premium_value" REAL /* Old value of the premium rate */,
  "new_premium_value" REAL /* New value of the premium rate */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the change */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the history record was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the history record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rate_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rate_history_premium_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("premium_rate_id") REFERENCES premium_rates ("premium_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source */,
  "last_checked_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last checked for updates */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_rate_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "premium_rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the premium rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the external data source */,
  "adjustment_value" REAL /* Value of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date the adjustment was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the adjustment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rate_adjustments_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rate_adjustments_premium_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("premium_rate_id") REFERENCES premium_rates ("premium_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "exchange_rate_value" REAL /* Value of the exchange rate */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate becomes effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate ends */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_preferences" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en, fr) */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the language is the default */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the language preference was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the language preference was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_language_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user language preference was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user language preference was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_language_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_language_preferences_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES language_preferences ("language_id")
)
